header.title: CSS Formatter — Format, Minify & Beautify CSS Online
header.description: Free online CSS formatter to format, minify, and beautify CSS code with customizable indentation and style options. Validate syntax, compress for production, or expand for readability. Perfect for front-end developers.
header.keywords: css formatter, css beautifier, css minifier, format css online, css pretty print, css style formatter, css code formatter, css validator

howToUse.title: How to Use the CSS Formatter
howToUse.step1Desc: Paste your CSS code into the input area on the left side.
howToUse.step2Desc: Adjust indentation, brace style, property sorting, and color format to match your preferences.
howToUse.step3Desc: Switch between Formatted (pretty-print) and Minified (compressed) views.
howToUse.step4Desc: Check the stats and fix any detected issues, then copy or download the result.

items.question: Can this tool detect CSS errors?
items.answer: Yes. The tool highlights syntax issues including missing braces, invalid property values, and duplicate selectors.

items.question: What indentation options are available?
items.answer: You can choose between spaces (2 or 4) or tabs, and decide whether opening braces go on the same line or a new line.

items.question: Can I sort CSS properties alphabetically?
items.answer: Yes. Enable the Alphabetical sort option to reorder properties from a to z, or use Grouped for logical ordering.

items.question: Does the tool remove comments?
items.answer: Yes. Toggle the Remove Comments option to strip all CSS comments from the output.
